data.title: Getinge reports stable organic sales growth in Q2 2025 with positive trend, despite challenges.
data.description: In Gothenburg, Sweden, on July 18, 2025, a report stated that the success seen in the beginning of the year persisted into the second quarter. There was steady organic growth in both order intake and sales. Despite facing challenges like tariffs and adverse currency impacts, margins improved. These achievements were highlighted by Mattias Perjos,....

data.title: MoneyHero Group awarded winners of SingSaver Best-Of Awards at Gala Event on 17 July 2025, recognizing excellence in Singapore’s finance sector.
data.description: A prestigious event held on 17 July 2025 in Singapore celebrated excellence and innovation in the personal finance sector. The gala recognized pioneering individuals and organizations driving positive change in the industry. Notable figures, including renowned experts and industry leaders, attended the event to honor the outstanding achievements. This event highlighted the importance of innovation and dedication in shaping the future of personal finance in Singapore.

data.title: Sharplink Gaming plans $6B share offering to buy 1% of ETH. Holds 280,000 ETH worth $515M in nine days.
data.description: The organization currently possesses over 280,000 ETH within its treasury. Within a span of just nine days, they have purchased Ethereum tokens amounting to a total of $515 million.

data.title: Notification of change in holdings and voting rights for Aspocomp Group Plc on July 17, 2025: Mikko Montonen's shares dropped below 5% threshold to 335,911 shares, equivalent to 4.90% of total shares.
data.description: As of July 17, 2025, Aspocomp Group Plc (business ID 1547801-5) received a notification of major shareholding as per the Finnish Securities Markets Act from Mr. Mikko Montonen. This notification was a result of changes to the transparency directive in the act. On this date, Mikko Montonen's holdings and voting rights in Aspocomp Group Plc dropped below the 5 percent threshold, with a total of 335,911 shares, equivalent to 4.90 percent of the total shares and votes in the company. This information was disclosed in a Stock Exchange Release on July 18, 2025 at 9:00 a.m.

data.title: Norsk Hydro ends power agreement with Cloud Snurran AB, receives up to EUR 90 million in compensation.
data.description: Hydro has reached a settlement with Cloud Snurran AB regarding their long-term power purchase agreement (PPA). As per the agreement, Hydro will receive compensation of potential EUR 90 million for choosing to terminate the PPA voluntarily.
